name: nsalvacao-claude-code-plugins
description: Marketplace for Nuno Salvacao's Claude Code plugins

metadata.description: Marketplace for Nuno Salvacao's Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: plugin-dev
plugins.description: Comprehensive toolkit for developing Claude Code plugins — hooks, MCP integration, plugin structure, settings, commands, agents, and skills. Forked from anthropics/claude-plugins-official with improvements: wrapper-format support in validator and arithmetic bug fix.

plugins.name: strategy-toolkit
plugins.description: Strategic ideation and execution planning toolkit with reproducible frameworks

plugins.name: repo-structure
plugins.description: Enterprise-grade repository structure analyzer, validator, and scaffolder with intelligent automation

plugins.name: product-management
plugins.description: Write feature specs, plan roadmaps, synthesise user research, and analyse competitors. Full PM workflow covered.

plugins.name: productivity
plugins.description: Task management, workplace memory, and a visual dashboard. Claude learns your people, projects, and terminology. Works in any project type.

plugins.name: productivity-cockpit
plugins.description: Task management, workplace memory, and an interactive cockpit dashboard with built-in AI chatbot. Works in any project type.

plugins.name: plugin-studio
plugins.description: Visual dashboard for creating and managing Claude Code plugins — browse structure, edit components, validate, and scaffold new plugins from a browser UI.

plugins.name: solution-audit
plugins.description: Continuous meta-quality audit system for solutions under development — evaluates coherence, architecture, documentation, onboarding, and UX across 7 dimensions with prioritized, actionable findings.

plugins.name: agile-lifecycle
plugins.description: Hybrid gated-iterative lifecycle framework for AI/ML products — 7 phases, 6 formal gates (A–F), 31 agents, 16 skills, and full artefact management. Enterprise agile with governance overlay.

plugins.name: waterfall-lifecycle
plugins.description: Formal predictive waterfall lifecycle framework for AI/ML products — 8 phases, 8 formal gates (A–H), 33 agents, 15 skills, and full artefact management. For regulated environments with formal handovers and requirements traceability.

plugins.name: audit-fleet
plugins.description: Cross-repository audit orchestration plugin for onboarding and quality assessment in any project, with deterministic outputs and SQLite-backed execution tracking.
